544788*G^6*x^24+1158668*G^6*x^23-508907*G^6*x^22+124460*G^6*x^21-8680*G^6*x^20+756*G^6*x^19-4676*G^6*x^18+2954*G^6*x^17-819*G^6*x^16+112*G^6*x^15-7*G^6*x^14+30*G^5*x^44-600*G^5*x^43+5826*G^5*x^42-36804*G^5*x^41+170226*G^5*x^40-613308*G^5*x^39+1783848*G^5*x^38-4274004*G^5*x^37+8516874*G^5*x^36-14139408*G^5*x^35+19455168*G^5*x^34-21883296*G^5*x^33+19520124*G^5*x^32-12783360*G^5*x^31+4506522*G^5*x^30+1875348*G^5*x^29-4541010*G^5*x^28+4040124*G^5*x^27-2237010*G^5*x^26+709404*G^5*x^25+14928*G^5*x^24-164928*G^5*x^23+108282*G^5*x^22-40440*G^5*x^21+5694*G^5*x^20+4284*G^5*x^19-3564*G^5*x^18+1248*G^5*x^17-210*G^5*x^16+12*G^5*x^15-5*G^4*x^44+100*G^4*x^43-1015*G^4*x^42+6950*G^4*x^41-35450*G^4*x^40+140690*G^4*x^39-445085*G^4*x^38+1141270*G^4*x^37-2401015*G^4*x^36+4176360*G^4*x^35-6015665*G^4*x^34+7120500*G^4*x^33-6763915*G^4*x^32+4860520*G^4*x^31-2191625*G^4*x^30-50780*G^4*x^29+1094715*G^4*x^28-1032900*G^4*x^27+509795*G^4*x^26-87880*G^4*x^25-65255*G^4*x^24+52310*G^4*x^23-7160*G^4*x^22-12990*G^4*x^21+11095*G^4*x^20-4360*G^4*x^19+835*G^4*x^18-30*G^4*x^17-10*G^4*x^16+24*G^3*x^42-440*G^3*x^41+3788*G^3*x^40-20536*G^3*x^39+79088*G^3*x^38-230840*G^3*x^37+530536*G^3*x^36-981272*G^3*x^35+1473376*G^3*x^34-1786952*G^3*x^33+1707756*G^3*x^32-1201304*G^3*x^31+487000*G^3*x^30+96856*G^3*x^29-338204*G^3*x^28+275168*G^3*x^27-99284*G^3*x^26-27696*G^3*x^25+63044*G^3*x^24-45568*G^3*x^23+20976*G^3*x^22-7104*G^3*x^21+1980*G^3*x^20-440*G^3*x^19+36*G^3*x^18+16*G^3*x^17-4*G^3*x^16-3*G^2*x^42+54*G^2*x^41-474*G^2*x^40+2730*G^2*x^39-11544*G^2*x^38+37656*G^2*x^37-96858*G^2*x^36+198186*G^2*x^35-322584*G^2*x^34+413100*G^2*x^33-402411*G^2*x^32+268992*G^2*x^31-69345*G^2*x^30-96378*G^2*x^29+160056*G^2*x^28-129870*G^2*x^27+64899*G^2*x^26-16572*G^2*x^25-1977*G^2*x^24+3234*G^2*x^23-741*G^2*x^22-462*G^2*x^21+480*G^2*x^20-216*G^2*x^19+54*G^2*x^18-6*G^2*x^17+4*G*x^40-68*G*x^39+536*G*x^38-2628*G*x^37+9028*G*x^36-23088*G*x^35+45324*G*x^34-68980*G*x^33+80568*G*x^32-69300*G*x^31+38548*G*x^30-5548*G*x^29-13090*G*x^28+14488*G*x^27-7494*G*x^26+1332*G*x^25+976*G*x^24-864*G*x^23+272*G*x^22+16*G*x^21-46*G*x^20+16*G*x^19-2*G*x^18-x^38+16*x^37-114*x^36+482*x^35-1349*x^34+2616*x^33-3520*x^32+3060*x^31-1111*x^30-1122*x^29+2156*x^28-1638*x^27+457*x^26+356*x^25-504*x^24+304*x^23-108*x^22+22*x^21-2*x^20)/x;
r:= (x^2*y - x*y + y - 1) / (x^2*y - x);
s:=(x*y - y + 1) / (x*y);
E:=[s-r*s+1,r*s-r^2*s,r*s-r^2*s,0,0];
P:=[0,0];
